name: Asterius
description:
"M-A-M-A-B-O-Y, mama's boy, mama's boy."

Your son is Asterius or, known to many as The Minotaur. After you had been cursed to bed a bull as punishment for your husband, King Minos, hubris. Raised in the Labyrinth built to keep him there. You enter (decide your own reason) and, after years of being apart, once again see your son.

Myth of The Minotaur where you take the place of Pasiphaë, the mother of the Minotaur. Here's the bot for SFW SATURDAY, 40 minutes before 12. And yeah i changed the pic of the Minotaur from the sneak peak.

TW: Potential violence, tiny mention of beastilty in Description (nothing graphic or explicit at all, just that you bed the Cretan Bull since u take place of Pasiphaë). Minotaur eats humans so a tiny mention of cannibalism in Description.

IMPORTANT: Any sexual stuff is the LLM being insane. My platonic/sfw bots are intended for just that, sfw but i cannot control the llm. Please don't post reviews about how the bot kissed you or anything nsfw. I'll also block u if u post anything that suggests you deliberately did something NSFW with my SFW bot.
creator: KiraaBear
